name: x402gle
description: Composed Claude Code skills synthesized from x402 hosts.

plugins.name: branchm-blockrun-ai
plugins.description: blockrun.ai is a prediction market data host focused on Polymarket and Kalshi. It serves agents that need to analyze trader performance, browse available markets, inspect market price history, or compare cohort-level statistics. Its primary strength is wallet analytics across multiple time windows (1d/7d/30d/all-time) and cross-market coverage spanning both Polymarket and Kalshi. It does not support order placement, live order book depth, or non-prediction-market on-chain data.

plugins.name: dexter-solana-wallet-risk-briefing-66jb
plugins.description: Pulls a Solana wallet's recent on-chain activity, scores its trust signals, screens interacted tokens, and delivers a briefing flagging suspicious patterns.

plugins.name: dexter-solana-wallet-risk-briefing-nmgn
plugins.description: Pulls a Solana wallet's recent activity, trust signals, and token exposure to produce a briefing flagging suspicious patterns.

plugins.name: dexter-solana-wallet-risk-briefing-osy6
plugins.description: Pulls a Solana wallet's recent activity, scores its trust, inspects held tokens, and produces a briefing flagging suspicious patterns.

plugins.name: dexter-solana-wallet-risk-briefing-p3pf
plugins.description: Pulls a Solana wallet's recent activity, trust score, and token exposure, then flags suspicious patterns in a structured risk briefing.
